Boxi 1 Year Extended Warranty Service Contract for Tablet Products (from EGP55001 to EGP60000) (Email Delivery to your Amazon Email ID | No Physical Delivery)
from Boxi - out of the box protection
  • What's Covered: 1-year Extended Warranty Service Contract covers against unforeseen mechanical, electrical, and manufacturer defects, and is valid starting 12 months from the purchase date or after the expiry of the brand manufacturer's issued warranty, whichever is later, and on products purchased from Amazon.eg in the last 30 days, offers an unlimited number of service requests, and no claim fee is charged when filing a claim.
  • Delivery: service contract is downloadable within 3 working days by logging in to your Amazon account, Login>>Account & Lists>>Your Account>>Your Messages. Cancel at any time; full refund within 30 days if no claim has been made.
  • Service fulfillment : All service requests are managed by our selected network of service centers, with Egypt-wide coverage and free pickup and delivery service.
  • Replacements: If your product cannot be repaired, you will be eligible for a replacement. If the item or category is no longer available, an Amazon Gift Card will be provided, with up to 75% of the item price. Your contract ends after we replace or send a gift card.
  • Requests & Support: You can raise any request by contacting us at claims@amnly.com and sharing your order ID, and we will process your request.
More details: 1-Year Extended Warranty by Boxi (Email delivery)

Return Instructions

As per our return policy, we need to verify your identity to process your return. This is a one-time process, and takes 2-3 minutes to complete.
Keep the item in its original condition, with brand outer box, brand/price tags attached, user manual, warranty cards, CDs and original accessories in manufacturer packaging for a successful return pick-up. If the item(s) is delivered by a seller directly, you need to ship the item(s) back to the seller within 10 days from the date your return is requested.

Memory Storage Capacity 256 GB

Operating System Android

See more

About this item

  • The first-ever AI-powered tablet: Galaxy Tab S10 Series is pre-equipped with Galaxy AI, Every detail designed to elevate your creativity, from the redesigned pen to the captivating camera deco
  • Go large or ultra-large: Samsung tablet with Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Anti-reflection technology and Vision Booster for optimal viewing in any light
  • Power through anything: Fly through games and multitask with ease thanks to an ultra-fast processor and a larger Vapor Chamber cooling system, The ultra-durable Armor Aluminium frame is built to last
  • A battery that keeps up with you: Game longer, watch more, and work harder with a battery that won't slow you down, Super Fast Charge gets you back to 100% in a flash
  • Galaxy AI Key is highkey amazing: Unleash the power of AI directly from your keyboard with a single tap on the dedicated Galaxy AI Key, Search the web, find answers, and boost your productivity
  • Knox Guard is a Samsung Knox cloud security service designed to protect devices against fraud and theft, even after reset or rooting attempts. It allows retailer to remotely lock a device if a buyer reports that the phone was missing from the delivered package or claims the order was not received.
› See more product details

      Graphics Description Dedicated

      Warranty Type Limited
      Display
      Screen Size 14.6 Inches
      Display Resolution Maximum 1812x2176
      Display Type AMOLED
      Native Resolution 1812x2176 pixels
      Aspect Ratio 16:9
      Display Refresh Rate in Hertz 120
      Battery
      Battery Capacity 11200
      Battery Power 45 Watts
      Processor
      Processor Description Samsung Exynos 5G-enabled series or Qualcomm Snapdragon 5G-enabled series
      Processor Brand Samsung
      Camera
      Video Capture Resolution 4K UHD 2160p
      Camera Description [Basic camera capabilities, suitable for typical use cases like video conferencing]
      Audio
      Supported Audio Format AAC, FLAC, MP3, OGG, WAV
      Headphones Jack No headphones jack (Bluetooth-only)

      Product description

      Network

      • Network: GSM / HSPA / LTE / 5G

      Body

      • Dimensions: 326.4 x 208.6 x 5.4 mm
      • Weight:
        • Wi-Fi model: 718g
        • 5G model: 723g
      • Build: Glass front, aluminum frame, aluminum back
      • SIM: Nano-SIM + eSIM (cellular model only)
      • IP68 dust/water resistant
      • Stylus with 2.8ms latency
      • Enhanced Armor aluminum

      Display

      • Type: Dynamic AMOLED 2X, 120Hz, HDR10+
      • Size: 14.6 inches (617.8 cm²)
      • Resolution: 1848 x 2960 pixels (239 ppi)
      • Screen-to-body ratio: ~90.7%

      Platform

      • OS: Android 14, One UI 6.1
      • Chipset: Mediatek Dimensity 9300+ (4 nm)
      • CPU: Octa-core
        • 1x3.4 GHz Cortex-X4
        • 3x2.8 GHz Cortex-X4
        • 4x2.0 GHz Cortex-A720
      • GPU: Immortalis-G720 MC12

      Memory

      • Card slot: microSDXC
      • RAM/Storage options:
        • 256GB/12GB RAM
        • Storage type: UFS

      Camera

      • Main Camera:
        • 13 MP wide (f/2.0)
        • 8 MP ultrawide
        • Features: LED flash, HDR, panorama
        • Video: 4K@30fps, 1080p@30fps
      • Selfie Camera:
        • 12 MP wide
        • 12 MP ultrawide (120˚)
        • Video: 4K@30fps, 1080p@30fps

      Sound

      • Quad speakers (tuned by AKG)
      • No 3.5mm jack

      Connectivity

      • Wi-Fi: 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/6e/7, tri-band
      • Bluetooth: 5.3
      • GPS (cellular model only)
      • USB: Type-C 3.2, magnetic connector
      • No NFC, No Radio

      Features

      • Under-display fingerprint sensor
      • Accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass
      • Wireless Samsung DeX
      • Circle to Search

      Battery

      • Capacity: 11200 mAh Li-Po
      • Charging: 45W wired

      Colors

      • Moonstone Gray
      • Platinum Silver

      How are ratings calculated?
      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
